name: Can you take my iPSC_fast cells,maintain them and harvest 1

runs.query: Can you take my iPSC_fast cells,maintain them and harvest 1 billion cells in three days?

steps.reasoning: I'll start by checking compatibility for your iPSC-fast cells in a T75 flask at the default seeding density.

info_blocks.content:
**Max yield from 1 × T75:** ~6.4 million cells

**Your target:** 1,000,000,000 cells

**Gap:** ~156× more than one flask can provide

Please revise your target or let us know if you have access to additional flasks outside this workcell.
info_blocks.title: 📊 Yield Reality Check

options.label: 15k/cm² — 3 days to 70% confluency (~6.4M cells) ✅ Recommended for 3-day target

input_fields.label: Revised target cell count (max ~6.4M from 1 × T75)
Re-seed a new T75 flask after harvest?
Special instructions or notes
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. specific timepoints, downstream use, handling preferences...

arguments.message:
## 🔬 iPSC-fast Culture Setup

Compatibility check passed! Here's what's **fixed** by the system before we configure your run:

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Cell line | **iPSC-fast** |
| Labware | **1 × T75 flask** (75 cm²) |
| Media | **Media A** (room temp) |
| Dissociation | **TrypLE Express** |
| Handling | **Fast** (firm shaking) |
| Delivery format | **50 mL Falcon tube** |
| Doubling time | **~16 hours** |
| Max confluency | **70%** (routine) / **80%** (harvest) |

---

> ⚠️ **Important note on your 1 billion cell target:**
> A single T75 flask at maximum harvest yields approximately **~6.4 million cells**. Reaching **1 billion cells in 3 days** would require **~156 T75 flasks** running in parallel — which exceeds the single-flask system constraint.
>
> Please confirm your **actual target** or adjust expectations. The system can deliver up to **~6.4M cells** from one T75 run.

---

### Seeding Density Options

| Density | Starting cells | Time to 70% confluency | Est. harvestable cells |
|---------|---------------|------------------------|------------------------|
| **12k/cm²** (default) | 900K | 4 days | ~6.4M |
| **15k/cm²** | 1.125M | **3 days** ✅ | ~6.4M |
| **20k/cm²** | 1.5M | 2 days | ~6.4M |

Since you want harvest in **3 days**, the **15k/cm²** density is the best match.

steps.reasoning: Good — compatibility confirmed. Now let me present the key constraints and collect your experiment parameters.
